pi_items.source: Verified against setup_task.sh line 15 and export_result.sh line 14 - both reference this exact path
Verified against setup_task.sh lines 16-17 which clean up vertex_extraction.qgs and .qgz files

Analyzed setup_task.sh lines 27-50: Data contains 2 polygons with 5 vertices each = 10 total coordinates. Task description confirms 'expect approximately 8-10 point features' acknowledging QGIS may treat ring closure differently
Same source as min_rows. Max value of 12 provides safety margin beyond the actual 10 vertices
Analyzed actual polygon coordinates in setup_task.sh: Area A has longitudes -122.5, -122.2; Area B has -122.2, -121.9. Combined range: [-122.5, -121.9]
Analyzed actual polygon coordinates in setup_task.sh: Both Area A and Area B have latitudes 37.5 and 37.8. Combined range: [37.5, 37.8]

privileged_info_summary: The task uses synthetic data with 2 GeoJSON polygons (Area A and Area B) created in setup_task.sh. Each polygon has 5 vertices (4 corners + closing vertex) for a total of 10 coordinates. The data is in WGS84/EPSG:4326 CRS. Actual coordinate ranges are longitude [-122.5, -121.9] and latitude [37.5, 37.8], which differ from the metadata ranges of [-122.6, -121.8] and [37.4, 37.9] respectively.
